@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent’s execute_python step only computed the maximum discount from QuoteLineItem and searched knowledge articles for explicit “maximum/up to/no more than X% discount” patterns, ignoring setup/cost compliance rules, so it returned None instead of identifying the violating article (ka0Wt000000Eq0MIAS).
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@
